scripts.test:ci-chromium: npm run test:app-all & && npm run test:playwright-chromium
scripts.test:ci-firefox: npm run test:app-all & && npm run test:playwright-firefox
scripts.test:ci-webkit: npm run test:app-all & && npm run test:playwright-webkit
scripts.test:playwright: wait-on http://localhost:3021 && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && playwright test
scripts.test:playwright-chromium: wait-on http://localhost:3021 && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && playwright test --project chromium-react --project chromium-angular --project chromium-vue
scripts.test:playwright-firefox: wait-on http://localhost:3021 && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && playwright test --project firefox-react --project firefox-angular --project firefox-vue
scripts.test:playwright-webkit: wait-on http://localhost:3021 && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && playwright test  --project webkit-react --project webkit-angular --project webkit-vue
scripts.test:bash: wait-on http://localhost:3021 && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && /bin/bash
